_comment: ADOPT: the model inventory the harness runs on (HG-0006). One entry per model ROLE. model_id and prompt_version MUST be pinned (no 'latest'/floating tags). Per the model-risk-operating-model-runbook §2.2 matrix, medium AND high tiers need a passing eval run against THIS pin plus an independent validation sign-off (low is optional). Each eval must identify its dataset, runner and timestamp, and cite its REPORT artifact by ref + sha256 (1.10: a declared pass is not evidence). Verified by scripts/model-provenance-check.mjs, which also re-hashes the report. Replace these demo values with your real models; keep the shape.

runtime.suspension: Suspend to manual underwriting if override rate > 15% over 2 weeks or a drift alarm fires; the model-risk function holds the switch.
runtime.fallback: On model or provider outage: route to the manual underwriting queue; no automated limit decisions while degraded.
